evidence: I appreciate the characters being way more focused on just being kids...
This show gives us the much needed 'Adult TV' once we put our son to bed.
Its not that it takes a huge amount of education to appreciate it...
Overall, very age appropriate for age 7 to probably 12 or so...
The plot lines seem to move very quickly this season...
Its definitely a 'commitment'. Not something you can just off and on do for a little workout.
the writing was so refreshing and you can see how so much of it worked at the time...
the acting was amazing for the age ranges involved...
I loved the writing and the acting in this series.
We're 3/4 of the way through the series and have really enjoyed it.
Visually, it is just beautiful to watch...
the music was beautiful as always.
I enjoyed it a lot. Fantastic acting.
This show is not for the light minded...

summary: The user enjoys family-friendly and science fiction genres, with a preference for fast-paced narratives. They appreciate quality writing and acting but show low brand loyalty, indicating a more general enjoyment of various shows rather than specific creators.
